sources: https://api.pokemontcg.io/v2/cards?q=set.id:bw8 (rarity counts: Common 41, Uncommon 42, Rare 26, Rare ACE 3, Rare Holo 10, Rare Holo EX 8, Rare Ultra 5, Rare Secret 3)
notes:
RESEARCH (sourced, adversarial):
- Set structure (Bulbapedia Plasma_Storm_(TCG) + pokemontcg.io bw8 rarity counts, both fetched OK): 138 cards = 135 numbered + 3 secret. pokemontcg.io rarity tally: Common 41, Uncommon 42, Rare 26, Rare ACE 3, Rare Holo 10, Rare Holo EX 8, Rare Ultra 5, Rare Secret 3 (sums to 138).
- BUCKET MAPPING (critical): the given buckets are {common 41, uncommon 42, rare 29, rare-holo 10, ex 8, ultra-rare 5, secret-rare 3}. The set has NO 'ace-spec' bucket, so the 3 ACE SPEC (Rare ACE: Dowsing Machine, Scramble Switch, Victory Piece) were folded into 'rare' by the bucket builder: 26 Rare + 3 Rare ACE = 29 = given rare bucket. So ACE SPEC hits are absorbed into 'rare'. ex=8 = Rare Holo EX. ultra-rare=5 = Rare Ultra (4 Full Art EX + Colress Full Art). secret-rare=3 = Charizard 136, Blastoise 137, Random Receiver 138.
- Pull rates (ThePriceDex bw8 pull-rates page, fetched OK; community-aggregate sample): per-box averages over a 36-pack box: Secret Rare 0.5/box (1 in 75), Ultra Rare 0.9/box (1 in 42.2), Rare Holo EX 2.7/box (1 in 13.5), Rare ACE 1.5/box (1 in 24), Rare Holo 8/box (1 in 4.5). Converted to per-pack (x/36) for the rare-or-better slot.
- Pack structure (Bulbapedia Booster_pack_(TCG)): BW-era packs = 10 game cards = 5 common + 3 uncommon + 1 reverse-holo + 1 rare-or-better (Basic Energy 11th card only began Sun & Moon). ThePriceDex independently confirms 5 common + 3 uncommon + 10 cards.
- Products: standard 36-pack Booster Display Box. Plasma Storm is the FIRST-EVER Elite Trainer Box (released 2013-02-06, Bulbanews fetched OK) and it contained 7 packs, NOT the later-standard 8 (Bulbanews + DA Card World listing both state 7). So etb packs = 7.

MAPPING ONTO BUCKETS (rare-or-better slot, count=1, per-pack):
  secret-rare = 0.5/36 = 0.01389
  ultra-rare  = 0.9/36 = 0.025
  ex (Rare Holo EX) = 2.7/36 = 0.075
  rare-holo   = 8/36  = 0.22222
  rare (non-holo Rare + folded ACE SPEC) = remainder = 1 - 0.22222 - 0.075 - 0.025 - 0.01389 = 0.66389
    (of this, ~0.04167 is the ACE-SPEC contribution at 1.5/box; ~0.62222 is plain non-holo Rare)
  SUM = 0.66389 + 0.22222 + 0.075 + 0.025 + 0.01389 = 1.00000 (exact)

HIT ECONOMY SANITY: any EX-or-better ~11.4%/pack (~4.1/box: ~2.7 Rare Holo EX + ~0.9 Full Art Ultra + ~0.5 Secret). Plus ~1.5 ACE SPEC/box and ~8 Rare Holo/box. Matches ThePriceDex per-box averages and the published structure; not over-claimed. Vintage 2013 sealed box carries a large collector premium, so EV/booster sits well below current sealed box price - expected, not inflated.

CONFIDENCE = medium: ThePriceDex provides a per-set community-aggregate pull-rate dataset for bw8 (the five special-card rates are explicit published figures), and the bucket mapping is verified card-by-card against pokemontcg.io rarity counts. Not 'high' because ThePriceDex is a community/derived sample rather than a large first-party opening study; the rare vs rare-holo split rests on its aggregate box averages.
